AD_FIELD.NAME: Complete
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Complete clone transactions after creation
AD_FIELD.HELP:
If set to Y, this field indicates that the rule will complete transactions after having created them.
If the transaction type does not require completion (i.e. Financial Account Transactions), this control is ignored.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Module
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Module
AD_FIELD.HELP: Indicates the module the element forms part of.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Description
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A space to write additional related information.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A description is limited to 255 characters.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Document Action
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A means of changing the transaction status of the document.
AD_FIELD.HELP: You find the current status in the Document Status field. The options are listed in a popup

AD_FIELD.NAME: Obrectx_Gl_Journal_V_ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: G/L Journal template
AD_FIELD.HELP: G/L Journal template identifier

AD_FIELD.NAME: Obrectx_Template_Type_ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Recurring template type ID
AD_FIELD.HELP: Recurring template type ID

AD_FIELD.NAME: EM_Obrectx_Gl_Journal_ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: G/L Journal template identifier
AD_FIELD.HELP: If the current transaction is created as a recurring transaction from a template, this column identifies the template

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: 1st Dimension
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A display of optional elements that are previously defined for this account combination.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The user defined element displays the optional elements that have been defined for this account combination.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Document Date
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The time listed on the document.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Document Date indicates the date the document was generated. It may or may not be the same as the accounting date.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Asset
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An item which is owned and exchangeable for cash.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Any item of economic value owned by the corporation, especially that which could be converted to cash.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Total Debit Amount
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Total debit in document currency
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Total Debit indicates the total debit amount for a journal or journal batch in the source currency

AD_FIELD.NAME: Approved
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Indicates if this document requires approval
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Approved checkbox indicates if this document requires approval before it can be processed.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Recurring Template Type Name
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Name of the recurring template type
AD_FIELD.HELP: Name of the recurring template type

AD_FIELD.NAME: Product
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An item produced by a process.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifies an item which is either purchased or sold in this organization.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Print
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A reference stating whether or not the document has been printed at any time in the past.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Printed checkbox indicates if this document or line will included when printing.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Currency
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An accepted medium of monetary exchange that may vary across countries.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Indicates the currency to be used when processing this document.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Document Type
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A value defining what sequence and process setup are used to handle this document.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Document Type determines document sequence and processing rules

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Business Partner
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Anyone who takes part in daily business operations by acting as a customer, employee, etc.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Business Partner is anyone with whom you transact. This can include a customer, vendor, employee or any combination of these.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Total Credit Amount
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Total Credit in document currency
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Total Credit indicates the total credit amount for a journal or journal batch in the source currency

AD_FIELD.NAME: 2nd Dimension
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A display of optional elements that are previously defined for this account combination.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The user defined element displays the optional elements that have been defined for this account combination.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Accounting Schema
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The book containing all financial transactions recorded for the legal entity.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The book containing all financial transactions recorded for the legal entity.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Opening
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating this is an opening entry
AD_FIELD.HELP: A flag indicating this is an opening entry

AD_FIELD.NAME: Cloner Java Class
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The Java class used to clone templates into recurring transactions
AD_FIELD.HELP:
The Java class used to clone templates into recurring transactions.
This class must implement the Cloner interface (org.openbravo.financial.recurringtransactions.Cloner)

AD_FIELD.NAME: G/L Category
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A classification used to group lines in the general ledger.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The General Ledger Category is an optional, user defined method of grouping journal lines.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: EM_Obrectx_Recurring
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Recurring template
AD_FIELD.HELP: If Y the current transaction can be associated with a recurring rule and be the template for recurring transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Description
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A space to write additional related information.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A description is limited to 255 characters.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Description
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A space to write additional related information.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A description is limited to 255 characters.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Control Amount
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: If not zero, the Debit amount of the document must be equal this amount
AD_FIELD.HELP: If the control amount is zero, no check is performed.Otherwise the total Debit amount must be equal to the control amount, before the document is processed.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Description
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A space to write additional related information.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A description is limited to 255 characters.

AD_FIELD.NAME: EM_Obrectx_Gl_Journal_ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: G/L Journal template identifier
AD_FIELD.HELP: If the current transaction is created as a recurring transaction from a template, this column identifies the template

AD_FIELD.NAME: Process Now
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A request to process the respective document or task.
AD_FIELD.HELP: When this field is set as 'Y' a process is being performed on this record.

AD_FIELD.NAME: EM_Obrectx_Gl_Journal_ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: G/L Journal template identifier
AD_FIELD.HELP: If the current transaction is created as a recurring transaction from a template, this column identifies the template

AD_FIELD.NAME: Journal Batch
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: General Ledger Journal Batch
AD_FIELD.HELP: The General Ledger Journal Batch identifies a group of journals to be processed as a group.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Recurring Rule
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Recurring rule
AD_FIELD.HELP: Recurring rule to be used to create recurring transactions from this template

AD_FIELD.NAME: Journal Batch
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An often automatically generated identifier for all documents.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The document number is usually automatically generated by the system and determined by the document type of the document. If the document is not saved, the preliminary number is displayed in "<>". If the document type of your document has no automatic document sequence defined, the field will be empty when creating a new document. This is for documents which usually have an external number (like vendor invoice). If you leave the field empty, the system will generate a document number for you. The document sequence used for this fallback number is defined in the "Document Sequence" window with the name "DocumentNo_<TableName>", where TableName is the actual name of the table inside the database (e.g. C_Order).

AD_FIELD.NAME: Document No.
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An often automatically generated identifier for all documents.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The document number is usually automatically generated by the system and determined by the document type of the document. If the document is not saved, the preliminary number is displayed in "<>". If the document type of your document has no automatic document sequence defined, the field will be empty when creating a new document. This is for documents which usually have an external number (like vendor invoice). If you leave the field empty, the system will generate a document number for you. The document sequence used for this fallback number is defined in the "Document Sequence" window with the name "DocumentNo_<TableName>", where TableName is the actual name of the table inside the database (e.g. C_Order).

AD_FIELD.NAME: Currency Rate Type
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A distinct currency rate characteristic used for processes.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Conversion Rate Type indicates the type of rate to use when retrieving the conversion rate. It allows you to define multiple rates for the same to and from currency. For example you may have a set of rates used for daily transactions with a rate type of SPOT and rates for currency revaluation defined as REVAL.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Journal Batch
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: General Ledger Journal Batch
AD_FIELD.HELP: The General Ledger Journal Batch identifies a group of journals to be processed as a group.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Recurring
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Recurring template
AD_FIELD.HELP: If Y the current transaction can be associated with a recurring rule and be the template for recurring transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Document Status
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The Document Status indicates the status of a document at this time.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Document Status indicates the status of a document at this time. To change the status of a document, use one of the buttons usually located at the bottom of the document window.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Journal Entry
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: One transaction with a debit and credit and entered into the general ledger.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The General Ledger Journal identifies a group of journal lines which represent a logical business transaction

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Rate
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The percentage to be multiplied by the source to arrive at the tax or exchange amount.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Currency Conversion Rate indicates the rate to use when converting the source currency to the accounting currency

AD_FIELD.NAME: Period
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A specified time period.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Period indicates an exclusive range of dates for a calendar.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Name
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Recurring rule name
AD_FIELD.HELP: Recurring rule name

AD_FIELD.NAME: Document No.
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An often automatically generated identifier for all documents.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The document number is usually automatically generated by the system and determined by the document type of the document. If the document is not saved, the preliminary number is displayed in "<>". If the document type of your document has no automatic document sequence defined, the field will be empty when creating a new document. This is for documents which usually have an external number (like vendor invoice). If you leave the field empty, the system will generate a document number for you. The document sequence used for this fallback number is defined in the "Document Sequence" window with the name "DocumentNo_<TableName>", where TableName is the actual name of the table inside the database (e.g. C_Order).

AD_FIELD.NAME: Cost Center
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Division that adds to the cost of an organization
AD_FIELD.HELP: Division that adds to the cost of an organization. Internal structure for cost allocation.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Document Status
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The Document Status indicates the status of a document at this time.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Document Status indicates the status of a document at this time. To change the status of a document, use one of the buttons usually located at the bottom of the document window.

AD_FIELD.NAME: EM_Obrectx_Rule_ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Recurring rule
AD_FIELD.HELP: Recurring rule to be used to create recurring transactions from this template

AD_FIELD.NAME: Recurring Template Table
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A table that can be used as template to generate recurring transactions
AD_FIELD.HELP: A table that can be used as template to generate recurring transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Sales Campaign
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An advertising effort aimed at increasing sales.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Campaign defines a unique marketing program. Projects can be associated with a pre defined Marketing Campaign. You can then report based on a specific Campaign.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Posted
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An accounting status button that indicates if the transaction has already been posted to the general ledger or not.
AD_FIELD.HELP: An accounting status button that indicates if the transaction has already been posted to the general ledger or not. When doing the accounting manually this button can be used to post or unpost the transaction from the general ledger by hand.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Document Date
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The time listed on the document.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Document Date indicates the date the document was generated. It may or may not be the same as the accounting date.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Obrectx_Rule_ID
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Recurring rule identifier
AD_FIELD.HELP: Recurring rule identifier

AD_FIELD.NAME: Accounting Date
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The date this transaction is recorded for in the general ledger.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The date this transaction is recorded on in the general ledger. This date also indicates which accounting period within the fiscal year this transaction will be part of.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Next Execution Date
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The next date in which the rule needs to be triggered
AD_FIELD.HELP: The next date in which the rule needs to be triggered

AD_FIELD.NAME: Project
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Identifier of a project defined within the Project & Service Management module.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifier of a project defined within the Project & Service Management module.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Periodicity
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The frequency of recurrence
AD_FIELD.HELP: The frequency of recurrence: daily, monthly, quarterly or yearly.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Processed
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A confirmation that the associated documents or requests are processed.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Processed checkbox indicates that a document has been processed.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Posting Type
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A distinct posting amount characteristic used for processes and sometimes grouped within a category.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Posting Type indicates the type of amount (Actual, Encumbrance, Budget) this journal updated.
